Alliances & Policy Innovation.summary: Supports European Alliances for Innovation and forward-looking projects that test and scale new methods, curricula and governance models, connecting education, training and labour-market stakeholders.

Capacity Building in Higher Education.summary: Strengthens higher education systems in partner countries through modernisation, governance and digital transformation, including curriculum reform, quality assurance and international cooperation.

Capacity Building in VET.summary: Improves vocational education and training in partner countries by boosting relevance to labour-market needs, work-based learning, teacher training, and institutional capacity.

Cooperation Partnerships.summary: Funds transnational partnerships to develop, transfer and implement innovative practices, build organisational capacity, and improve quality and inclusion across education, training, youth and sport.

Higher Education Excellence.summary: Supports excellence initiatives (e.g., Teacher Academies, Centres of Vocational Excellence, European Universities) to raise quality, innovation and internationalisation in higher education.

Jean Monnet Actions.summary: Promotes teaching, research and debate on EU studies worldwide via modules, chairs, centres of excellence, networks and policy dialogue activities.

Policy Experimentation.summary: Enables authorities and organisations to run evidence-based pilots and trials of policy reforms in education and training, with evaluation and potential for scaling at system level.

Sport Capacity Building.summary: Builds capacity in the sport sector in partner countries, improving governance, integrity, inclusion, skills and sustainable sport development through cooperation projects.

Sport Events.summary: Supports not-for-profit European sport events that promote participation, inclusion and European values, often targeting grassroots sport and community impact.

Sport Partnerships.summary: Funds collaborative partnerships in sport to develop and share good practices, foster integrity and inclusion, and strengthen organisations and networks.

Virtual Exchanges.summary: Supports moderated online intercultural exchanges and collaborative learning activities, increasing access for participants who cannot join physical mobility and strengthening digital pedagogy.

Youth Actions.summary: Covers youth participation and mobility actions strengthening civic engagement, inclusion, competencies and European solidarity.

Youth Capacity Building.summary: Strengthens youth organisations and youth work systems in partner countries through cooperation, training and innovation, improving quality, outreach and sustainability.
